privacy.generalText: This Privacy Policy defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of users of the Resta application (hereinafter — the Application) in accordance with the Law of the Republic of Belarus No. 99-Z dated 07.05.2021 "On Personal Data Protection".
privacy.operatorText: The data controller is the owner of the Resta Application. Contact details of the controller are available in the "Support" section of the Application.
purposeList: Registration and authentication in the Application
Providing shift, vacancy, and employee search functionality
Selecting relevant offers based on city and specialization
Enabling communication between workers and venues
Displaying user profiles to other platform participants
Sending notifications about application statuses and new offers
Improving the quality of the Application
privacy.basisText: Personal data is processed based on the consent of the data subject (Article 5 of Law No. 99-Z). Consent is provided upon registration in the Application by accepting this Privacy Policy and the Terms of Service.
privacy.storageText: Personal data is stored for the entire period of Application use and 30 days after account deletion. After this period, data is permanently deleted. The user may request account and data deletion at any time through the "Settings" section of their profile.
rightsList: Obtain information about the processing of their personal data
Request cessation of processing and deletion of personal data
Withdraw consent to personal data processing
Appeal the controller's actions to the authorized personal data protection body
privacy.thirdPartyText: Personal data is not shared with third parties, except as required by the legislation of the Republic of Belarus. Contact details (phone, Telegram) are shared with another platform user only after mutual consent (acceptance of a shift application). An open geocoding service is used to determine the city by coordinates — coordinates are transmitted anonymously.
privacy.geolocationText: The Application may request access to device geolocation to determine the user's city and find nearby shifts. Geolocation is requested only with explicit user consent and is not collected in the background. The user may deny access — in that case, the city is selected manually.
privacy.contactText: For questions related to personal data processing, please contact us through the "Support" section in the Application.

terms.generalText: These Terms of Service (hereinafter — the Agreement) govern the use of the Resta application (hereinafter — the Application) and constitute a public offer in accordance with Article 407 of the Civil Code of the Republic of Belarus. By using the Application, you fully and unconditionally accept this Agreement.
terms.subjectText: The Application provides an information platform for interaction between HoReCa workers, dining establishments, and suppliers. The Application enables the posting and searching of shifts, vacancies, and the exchange of contact information between participants.
terms.platformText: Resta is exclusively an information platform and is not a party to labor, civil, or other relationships between users. Resta is not an employer, recruitment agency, job exchange, or employment intermediary. All relationships between a worker and a venue (including payment, working conditions, insurance) are established and governed directly between them in accordance with the legislation of the Republic of Belarus.
userList: Provide accurate information during registration and in their profile
Not use the Application to post knowingly false information
Independently settle labor and civil law relationships with other users
Comply with the legislation of the Republic of Belarus when formalizing labor relationships
Not transfer account access to third parties
Confirm that the user is at least 16 years old
terms.paymentText: Payment for completed shifts is made directly between the worker and the venue. Resta does not participate in payments, does not withhold commissions from wages, and is not responsible for the timeliness or completeness of payments. The parties independently determine the form and procedure of payment in accordance with the law.
terms.subscriptionText: The Application offers paid PRO subscriptions with extended functionality. Payment is made via Telegram Stars. The subscription is valid for the paid period and does not auto-renew. Refunds for unused subscription periods are handled in accordance with Telegram's policies. The user may cancel the subscription at any time — access is maintained until the end of the paid period.
terms.reviewsText: Users may leave reviews about their work experience. Reviews reflect the subjective opinion of the author and do not constitute an official employment reference. The administration reserves the right to moderate reviews containing insults, knowingly false information, or violations of law. Users may dispute a review through the "Support" section.
terms.liabilityText: Resta is not responsible for: actions or inactions of users; quality of work performed; users' compliance with labor legislation; accuracy of information posted by users; losses resulting from user interactions. Resta makes reasonable efforts to ensure uninterrupted operation of the Application but does not guarantee 24/7 availability.
terms.terminationText: The user may delete their account at any time through the "Settings" section of their profile. Upon account deletion, all personal data is deleted in accordance with the Privacy Policy. The administration reserves the right to block or delete a user's account for violations of this Agreement or the legislation of the Republic of Belarus.
terms.lawText: This Agreement is governed by the legislation of the Republic of Belarus. All disputes shall be resolved through negotiations, and if no agreement is reached — in court at the location of the controller in accordance with the legislation of the Republic of Belarus.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data. This action cannot be undone.
consequencesList: All personal data will be deleted
Shift and application history will be deleted
Reviews and ratings will be deleted
Active PRO subscription will be cancelled without refund
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: All data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.error: Failed to delete account. Please try again later.
